rule_metadata.name: WinPwnage
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'WinPwnage' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule WinPwnage
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'WinPwnage' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "WinPwnage"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\swinpwnage\.py/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /\/elevate_handle_inheritance\.py/ nocase ascii wide

		$metadata_regex_createobject = /(CreateObject|WScript\.)/ nocase ascii
